identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
principles: Fusion: Vogue Magazine meets SaaS Efficiency
Content: Data should look beautiful, not just functional
Contrast: Soft backgrounds with sharp, high-contrast typography

primary.name: Antique Rose
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Key Accents

typography.installation: Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css

areas.stats: col-span-full lg:col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4

buttons.primary: bg-[#C58970] hover:bg-[#B07860] text-white shadow-lg shadow-[#C58970]/20 transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.style: bg-[#FAFAF9] border-transparent focus:border-[#C58970] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C58970] rounded-lg h-12

sidebar.style: bg-white border-r border-[#E6CCB2]/30 w-64 hidden md:flex flex-col h-screen fixed left-0 top-0

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' fonts via Google Fonts import in index.css
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Rose & Stone' color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Main Content Area responsiveness.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the 'Dashboard' using the Bento Grid strategy defined above.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement 'AppointmentsPage' with a clean, vertical list view logic.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid for testing.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use default blue for links or buttons.
Use generous padding. 'Airy' is the keyword.
Text contrast must be WCAG AA compliant (4.5:1).
Use skeleton loaders for data fetching states.
Micro-interactions: Add subtle hover lifts to cards (-translate-y-1).
All forms must use Shadcn 'Form' component pattern.
Do NOT center text in the main content area; align left for readability.
